title: Protocol to harmonize reference data in support of the WorldCereal reference data repository
author: Hendrik Boogaard
license_note: Zenodo record metadata license field: cc-by-4.0
description:
Within WorldCereal we have built a community-based open harmonized reference data repository at global extent ready for model training or product validation. To structure, harmonize, annotate and assess quality aspects, a dedicated harmonization protocol was designed, defined and applied. The protocol includes: 

 
	 Selection criteria for useful data sets 
	 Instructions on the required file format (WorldCereal_FileFormat.xlsx) 
	 Instructions on the required attributes (WorldCereal_FileFormat.xlsx) 
	 Instructions to assess a proper validity date (DerivingValidityTime.pdf) 
	 Instructions to map original landcover, crop type and irrigation labels into the WorldCereal (legends WorldCereal_LC_CT_IRR_legends.xlsx) 
	 Define meta data for complete annotation (MetaDataTemplate.xlsx) and rules to assess the spatial, temporal, and thematic accuracy (ReferenceDatasetsConfidenceScoreCalculations.pdf, Protocol to assess spatial accuracy.pdf, DataQuality_Calculator.xlsx). 
 

 The PDF file WorldCereal harmonization protocol - overview.pdf introduces the protocol.
